State permit page Portal-first coverage

Texas permit pages

Texas currently has 3 covered jurisdictions in the PermitPulse catalog. 0 are API-backed, 3 are portal-only, and the current platform mix includes Accela (1), Arlington Permits (1), Dynamic Portal (1).

Open Mission Control Browse all states
3 Covered jurisdictions
0 API-backed
3 Portal-only
Covered jurisdictions

Texas city and county permit pages

These pages are generated directly from current jurisdiction metadata. Each one includes the official permit portal, platform label, coverage tier, and Mission Control path.

Portal-only

Arlington

Arlington Permits · Official portal fallback.

No direct data feed yet. Use the official Arlington permits portal to apply, track permits, and manage certificate of occupancy records.

Open permit page Official portal
Portal-only

Corpus Christi

Dynamic Portal · Official portal fallback.

No direct data feed yet. Use Corpus Christi's official building permits page to launch the Dynamic Portal for permit applications and status.

Open permit page Official portal
Portal-only

El Paso

Accela · Official portal fallback.

No direct data feed yet. Use the official City of El Paso Citizen Access portal to search permit and license applications.

Open permit page Official portal

Current catalog split

This state page is generated from current catalog metadata only. Use the grouped links below to move between API-backed and portal-only coverage without leaving the canonical directory layer.
